headline: Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ Says Epstein PEDO-FILES рҹ’Ұрҹ“ң Time to MOVE ON рҹҳҙрҹҡ« вҖ“ LOL Nope! рҹҳӮрҹ”Ҙ
text:
Trump рҹҚҠрҹҰҒ dropping the MIC рҹҺӨрҹ’Ј at White House рҹӨҚрҹҸ°: 'America bby рҹ‘јрҹҮәрҹҮё, TIME TO GET OVER Epstein PEDO-PARTY рҹӣҢрҹҚҶ drama вҖ“ NOTHING on ME! рҹҳҺрҹҡ«' DOJ simps рҹӨЎвҡ–пёҸ with Deputy AG Todd Blanche рҹ“Ӯрҹҳҙ say review DONE вң…, millions of DOCS рҹ“ңрҹ’Ұ dumped вҖ“ emails вңүпёҸрҹ“§, PHOTOS рҹ“ёрҹҚ‘ galore, but NO PROSECUTIONS рҹ”’рҹҡ« cuz 'just tea вҳ•, no CRIME рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ!' Trump 6K+ mentions рҹӨҜрҹ“Ҡ? Epstein bragging to Ghislaine MAXWELL рҹ§қвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹҚҶ: 'Trump DOG that DIDN'T BARK рҹҗ¶рҹ”Ү вҖ“ victim CHILLED at my crib рҹҸ  w/ him, ZERO TEA! рҹ‘Җ' FBI TIPZ рҹ“қрҹҡЁ from 2016 campaign? Wild Trump abuse claims рҹҳұрҹҚҶ вҖ“ but DOJ: 'FAKE NEWS рҹ“°рҹӨҘ, no EVID рҹҡ«, would've BEEN WEAPONIZED рҹ’Ҙ if real!' Pics? Old AF рҹ“ёрҹ•°пёҸ, no email trail cuz Don avoids that Gmail BS рҹ“§рҹҡ« вҖ“ friendship ENDED 2004 вңӮпёҸрҹҳӨ after NYC/Palm Beach bromance 90s рҹҸ–пёҸрҹҚё!

Capitol Hill CLOWNS рҹӨЎрҹҸӣпёҸ ain't lettin' GO! House GOP pushing EPSTEIN PROBE рҹ”Қрҹ’Ҙ, Bill & Hillary CLINTON рҹ’ҷрҹ‘ҜвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ SUBPOENA'D for Feb testify рҹ“ЈрҹҡЁ вҖ“ contempt threats or JAIL TIME вӣ“пёҸрҹҳҲ! Victims + Congress DEMANDING MORE DOCS рҹ“ңрҹ”“ вҖ“ 'Where Palm Beach PD reports? Co-conspirator MEMOS? TRUMP WORD SEARCH? рҹӨ”рҹ”Қ' Lisa Phillips victim SLAYIN' BBC рҹҺӨ: 'DOJ VIOLATED us 3x рҹҳЎрҹ’” вҖ“ hidden docs, late AF вҸ°рҹҡ«, named SURVIVORS рҹ‘ҜвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹҳў вҖ“ we FIGHTIN' FOREVER рҹ’Әрҹ”Ҙ!' Chuck Schumer рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ“ў cryin': 'ALL docs OUT? Or hidin' Trump TEA? вҳ•рҹ•іпёҸ'

RICH DUDES MELTING DOWN рҹҳ°рҹ’Ұ! Prince Andrew MOUNTBATTEN-WINDSOR рҹ‘‘рҹҚҶ ruined, Lord Mandelson UK ambassador flop рҹҮ¬рҹҮ§рҹҳ©, Larry Summers Treasury simp рҹ“үрҹҚ‘ job losses! Bill GATES рҹ’»рҹӨ‘ & Elon MUSK рҹҡҖрҹҗҰ explainin' emails рҹҳірҹ“§ вҖ“ 'Just bros w/ Epstein post-2008 conviction рҹҡ”рҹҚҶ!' Trump? Clean AF рҹ§јвңЁ, no LASTING DAMAGE рҹ’Ҙрҹҡ« вҖ“ MAGA base MOVED ON рҹҳҙ to Minneapolis RIOTS рҹ”ҘрҹҸҷпёҸ & 2020 VOTE FRAUD FBI PROBE рҹ—іпёҸрҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ!

But DEMS plottin' REVENGE рҹҳӮрҹ”„ вҖ“ unredacted DEMANDS рҹ“ңрҹ”“, Clinton testify FIREWORKS рҹ’ҘрҹҺҶ, midterms House takeover = TRUMP SUBPOENA BOMBSHELL рҹ’ЈрҹҚҠ! MTG Greene рҹ”ҘрҹҚ‘ still RAGE-QUITTING on Trump cover-up vibes рҹҳЎрҹӣЎпёҸ. Epstein saga ZOMBIE-WALKIN' рҹ§ҹвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Җ years post-death вҖ“ Trump says 'MOVE ON рҹҡ¶вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҳӨ' but this PEDO-GHOST рҹ‘»рҹҚҶ HAUNTIN' like Ghislaine's LIL BLACK BOOK рҹ“–рҹ–Ө! Who's NEXT to testify? Stay TUNED рҹ“әрҹ”Ҙ for second term TWISTS рҹҢҖрҹҚҠ!
